channel.title: Test on Zhenyu Ren's Website
channel.description: Recent content in Test on Zhenyu Ren's Website

item.title: Links
item.description: If you like my theme, take a look at: How to use this website? Collections of Tags and Categories for my technical blogs. Website status (It takes several seconds to show): https://rzy0901.github.io https://renzhenyu.site Friend Links（友链）: Website Description Li-baster （李乾任） 本硕同门，DQN，凸优化，WiFi大

item.title: CV
item.description: ⚠ INFO: This page might be outdated. Resume for Zhenyu Ren (任振裕) [CV.pdf] Zhenyu Ren (任振裕) Email: zrenax@connect.ust.hk; Website: https://renzhenyu.site; Github: https://github.com/rzy0901. I am a Ph.D. student in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST), supervised by Prof. Mo Li. My research interests focus on: Short-range Wireless Communication Protocols & Security (Nearlink, BLE,

item.title: A Long-term Losing Weight Campaign
item.description: Weight Tracking Record Note 1. Page content is generated via GPT:) in 5 minutes, which convinces me that AI will let front end enginners lose their jobs, at least. (I am not a blind AI supporter. I used to think I was good at coding and proud of it. But now I feel that I may need to learn something different in the age of LLM.) 2. Starting from October

item.title: 利用Icloud对Zotero参考文献进行多端同步（MAC，Windows）
基于Frp的内网穿透，校园网外ssh访问实验室服务器
利用Ngrok实现内网穿透，并访问局域网下的openssh服务器
item.description: 引子 事情的最初是实验室同门乾任和我，发现实验室一台没有人用的电脑具有两张3090显卡。我们问了一圈实验室，大家都忘记了密码，于是我们为这台电

item.title: Wireless Channel Trouble-Shooting
item.description: DISCLAIMER: This note is for reference only. I am not 100% sure of the accuracy of my note. If you find any mistakes/typos, feel free to contact me. This note records some interesting issues that I met in wireless channel modeling 😄. CIR, CFR (CSI) Conversion Channel Impulse Response (CIR): \(h(t,\tau)\); Channel Frequency Response (CFR): \(H(t,f)\). \(t\): time domain; \(\tau\): delay domain; \(f\): frequency domain. Discrete Fourier Transform (DFT),

item.title: Notes for Bistatic Radar Cross Section (RCS)
item.description: Radar Cross Section This document records some possible useful rcs-related equations for my simulations 😄. RCS Definition1 The RCS represents an equivalent aperture surface area of the target, which captures a certain amount of incident radiation, and which, if re-radiated isotropically, would produce an equivalent scattered field at the receiver. For 2d target: \[\begin{aligned} \sigma_{2d}=\begin{cases}\lim_\limits{\rho \to \infty}\left[2\pi \rho \frac{S^s}{S^i}\right]\\ \lim_\limits{\rho \to \infty}\left[2\pi \rho \frac{|E^s|^2}{|E^i|^2}\right]\\ \lim_\limits{\rho \to \infty}\left[2\pi \rho \frac{|H^s|^2}{|H^i|^2}\right] \end{cases} \end{aligned}.

item.title: 在Hugo theme-even上简单实现暗黑模式
item.description: 暗黑模式介绍 Hugo的even主题在github已经两年没有更新了，我应该是第一个为该主题提供暗黑模式的人（但是由于在手机端还有bug，我暂

item.title: 基于深度摄像机ZED 2i提取导出三维人体骨骼
item.description: ZED SDK 安装，功能参考实现链接：ZED SDK Documentations以及Body Tracking Overview。 3D Body Tracking需要CUDA11.1以上

item.title: OpenPose初使用: CV的方法提取人体骨骼
item.description: OpenPose安装及测试环境 OpenPose官网; 参考安装教程; 注意OpenPose与Anaconda不兼容。 测试环境： Ubuntu 20.04和NV

item.title: Linux Summary
item.description: Linux Summary windows双系统干净删除Ubuntu 磁盘管理 删除卷。 CMD： 1 2 3 4 5 6 diskpart list disk select disk 0 list partition select partition 1 assign letter = j 管理员权限打开记事本，删除J/

item.title: Notebook for Applied Stochastic Processes
item.description: info This is a collection of my notes for SUSTech MA208 “Applied Stochastic Processes”, in the spring semester of 2022, based on Professor Zhang Yiying (张艺赢)’s lectures and slides. 毕业压力好大，暂时更新了第一章，可以作为概率论知识汇总作为

item.title: Intoduction（写在前面）
item.description: Why I set up such a Personal Website1 Firstly, from the point of view as a student, I think it is necessary for me to build up a private place to record and manage my notes (or some other things) efficiently. In the past three years of my undergraduate student career, I could always dig some interesting ideas almost every day but not always had a chance (or a good
